headline: CrowdStrike Just Bet Big On the Huge Disconnect Between Growth and Its Stock
summary: Cybersecurity sits at the center of every boardroom conversation these days. AI has turbocharged both threats and defenses, pushing the sector toward $500 billion in annual spending by decade’s end. Yet many leading stocks have traded sideways or dipped amid broader market jitters and slowing growth elsewhere in tech. CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) just stepped up with ... CrowdStrike Just Bet Big On the Huge Disconnect Between Growth and Its Stock

headline: Is Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (PANW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PANW a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Palo Alto Networks, Inc. on MTC’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PANW. Palo Alto Networks, Inc.’s share was trading at $147.02 as of March 27th. PANW’s trailing and forward P/E were 90.53 and 44.25 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Palo Alto […]

headline: Jim Cramer Says “In Fairness, Zscaler Shouldn’t Have Been Hit All That Hard”
